reason: C shell (csh) is a real UNIX shell; 'D shell' and 'A shell' do not exist, so 'All of the above' is false.
ANSI = American National Standards Institute; option A is the intended (slightly misspelled) expansion.
4 red out of 4+6=10 marbles gives P(red)=4/10.
SQL is the query/DML language for retrieving and updating database data.
Normalization is the process of organizing data into tables to remove redundancy/ambiguity.
A data dictionary is a collection of descriptions of data objects for programmers and other users.
Spreading tablespaces over multiple disks parallelizes I/O and minimizes disk I/O contention ('connection' is a typo for contention).
In Oracle, NULL denotes a value that is unknown/missing/inapplicable, not zero or blank.
Data hierarchy largest to smallest: file > record > field.
AND outputs 1 only when both inputs are 1; A and C ('1 AND 1 is 0') are duplicates and wrong, B is wrong.
OR outputs 1 if any input is 1, so 0 OR 1 = 1; all other listed rows are false.
vi is the standard UNIX visual editor; 'iv', 'edit', 'editor' are not.
HF long-haul links rely on ionospheric refraction (sky wave); ground/surface and space waves are short-range.
OSI layers include Data Link, Presentation, Application; there is no 'Communication' layer.
ipconfig displays the host's IP configuration settings; ping tests reachability, route shows routing table, snmp is a protocol.
An IP address splits into a network ID and a host ID.
Only A gives a sensible order: define, plan, approve, implement, evaluate.
1 PB = 1024 TB > 1 TB; the other options (1000 MB ~ 1 GB, 100 GB, 1e6 KB ~ 1 GB) are all smaller than a TB.
